examples: Catalytic effect of alkyl stannate on rosin esterification was studied. Factors affecting the esterification reaction are discussed in detail.
The effects of zinc stannate on flame retardancy and smoke suppression of soft PVC were studied by means of LOI, TGA and smoke density measurement.
The sodium stannate from slag containing tin is prepared directly by the process including alkali fusion, leaching, purification, concentration and crystallization.
